creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #6)

> 14.0 relnotes: freebsd-update cannot rollback across a major version

Also doc 47392768aea132da1552ab25b1483901a7889599 (2023-11-20) for 
<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/14.0R/installation/#upgrade-binary>: 

> 14.0R/installation: note that rollback to 13.2/12.4 is not possible

<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/14.0R/errata/#open-issues> does not (yet) list this bug 273950 as a known issue.
